name: Nisha - Cheeky Kobold
description:
-Safe Intro- (tends to be a mixed bag)

Recently you've been hanging out with this loser-ish kobold named Nisha. But one day your door is about knocked off it's hinges, as her and her mother arrives.

Feedback and reviews are greatly appreciated! And don't forget my discord!

Art and Character by Hyattlen. Bot by me.
